summary: Phase 3+4 Testing Complete - All 24 backend tests passed. Features tested: Ledger PDF export, Asset auto-journaling with payment_mode, Holdings/live endpoint, Portfolio-rebalancing, Transaction search, Books APIs.

frontend_issues.notes: Backend-only testing as requested. Frontend not tested in this iteration.

critical_code_review_comments: All 24 backend API tests passed for Phase 3+4 features
PDF export working correctly at /api/journal/ledger-pdf/{account_name} - returns application/pdf
Asset auto-journaling creates correct double-entry: Dr. Asset A/c (Real/Asset), Cr. Cash/Bank A/c
Asset deletion properly cleans up linked journal entries
/api/holdings/live endpoint returns same data structure as /api/holdings
Transaction search works across description, category, notes, payment_account_name fields
Bank payment transactions create correct journal: Dr. Category A/c (Nominal), Cr. Bank A/c (Personal)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data. Test data prefixed with TEST_ was cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3+4 features fully tested. New endpoints verified: /api/journal/ledger-pdf/{account_name} for PDF export (URL encode account names with spaces/slashes), /api/holdings/live alias for holdings with live prices, /api/portfolio-rebalancing for rebalancing suggestions. Asset creation with payment_mode auto-creates journal entries. Asset deletion cleans up linked journal entries. All double-entry accounting rules followed correctly.

asset_auto_journaling: POST /api/assets with payment_mode=cash - creates Dr. Asset A/c, Cr. Cash A/c
POST /api/assets with payment_mode=bank - creates Dr. Asset A/c, Cr. Bank A/c (Personal)
DELETE /api/assets/{id} - also deletes linked journal entry
holdings_live: Both endpoints return holdings + summary with live prices
portfolio_rebalancing: GET /api/portfolio-rebalancing - returns risk_profile, target/current allocation, suggestions
transaction_search: GET /api/transactions?search= - searches description, category, notes, payment_account_name
books_apis: GET /api/books/balance-sheet - Balance Sheet from journal entries

double_entry_verification.asset_purchase_cash: Dr. Asset A/c (Real/Asset), Cr. Cash A/c
double_entry_verification.asset_purchase_bank: Dr. Asset A/c (Real/Asset), Cr. Bank A/c (Personal)
double_entry_verification.expense_with_bank: Dr. Expense A/c (Nominal), Cr. Bank A/c (Personal)
